description.ko: 심해의 압도적인 어둠 속에서 빛의 파동을 통해 소통하는 생물 발광 생명체들의 평온하고 분위기 있는 묘사.
description.en: A serene and atmospheric depiction of bioluminescent life forms communicating through light pulses in the crushing darkness of the ocean deep.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean floor, titled 'The Abyssal Pulse.' A swarm of #40E0D0 turquoise bioluminescent jellyfish with long, translucent #48D1CC cyan filaments pulsate in rhythmic unison. The #000080 midnight water is thick with shimmering marine snow. In the background, ancient #006994 mineral vents release bubbles that glow with internal thermal light. 8k resolution, photorealistic fluid dynamics, capturing the peaceful, rhythmic dance of transparent life in the high-pressure deep.
